## Summary

What does this PR do? One or two sentences.

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Schema / data-model change (potentially breaking)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests / fixtures only
- [ ] Build / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests covering the change
- [ ] Updated [docs/architecture.md](../docs/architecture.md) if the data model changed
- [ ] Added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] For schema changes: included a migration note in the changelog

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should look at first, design decisions you'd like a second opinion on, or things deliberately left for a follow-up.
